{{Quote|Cut the act uncle, I know you killed my father! Now with the Empire on your side, I can't get the mines back. But at least I'll have the satisfaction of watching you beg for your life.|Arista Kabul|<ref name="Three Against the Galaxy">{{Tales|3|Three Against the Galaxy}}</ref>}}
'''Arista Kabul''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Otunia]] and the daughter of [[Lorn Kabul]], who owned a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation. Despite being a crack shot and perfectly able to take care of herself, her father made her perpetually wear a [[Homing beacon/Legends|tracking device]] around her ankle.

When Lorn was killed by his brother [[Seth Kabul]] who, conspiring with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Harsh]], wanted to take over the mining operations, Arista joined forces with the strong and unusually noble [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Grissom (Gamorrean)|Grissom]] and the technically-minded [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Tek]] who was a [[Bounty/Legends|wanted]] man. Arista understood [[Jawaese/Legends|Jawaese]].

Tek removed the [[Homing beacon/Legends|tracking device]] such that Arista's uncle would not be able to track them down, and together the trio managed to sabotage the mining operation, ruining everything for her uncle and make it off-[[Planet/Legends|planet]].
